engine: Gasoline and hybrid powertrains covered by the 2021 Explorer Gas/HEV Owner's Manual

interval.logic: Intelligent Oil-Life Monitor; normal examples are 7,500-10,000 miles, severe examples 5,000-7,500 miles, and extreme examples 3,000-5,000 miles; do not exceed the one-year maximum

maintenance.notes: Hybrid vehicles may exceed 10,000 miles between oil changes, but the manual still states not to exceed the one-year maximum. Reset the monitor after service.

maintenance.service: Rotate tires and perform oil-change interval inspections

interval.logic: At every oil-change interval as indicated by the information display

maintenance.notes: Includes tire rotation, multi-point inspection, brake pads/rotors/hoses/parking brake, cooling system, exhaust, heat shields, front axle, rear axle and U-joints, half-shaft boots, steering linkage, ball joints, suspension, tie-rod ends, tires, wheels, and related components.
Owner checks include engine oil level, lights, tires including spare, washer fluid, and tail pipe holes/slots.

Includes battery connections, body and door drains, cooling system level and strength, weatherstrips, hinges/latches/locks, parking brake, seatbelts and latches, safety warning lamps, and washer spray/wiper operation.
Time-based service; the manual says not to exceed the designated time interval and notes special equipment at an authorized dealer.
Perform within 3,000 miles of the last engine oil and filter change. Dusty or dirty conditions require more frequent inspection and replacement.
Perform within 3,000 miles of the last engine oil and filter change. Dusty or dirty conditions require more frequent inspection and replacement.
Special operating conditions such as towing, extended idling, or low-speed heavy commercial use list spark plug replacement at 60,000 miles.

maintenance.service: Inspect accessory drive belt or belts

interval.logic: Inspect at 100,000 miles, then every other oil change until replaced

maintenance.notes: Do not treat inspection as replacement.
Special-condition examples may align this item within 3,000 miles of an oil-change message when specified by the schedule.

maintenance.service: Replace accessory drive belt or belts

interval.logic: Every 150,000 miles if not replaced within the last 100,000 miles

maintenance.service: Change engine coolant and motor electronics coolant

interval.logic: Initial replacement at 10 years or 200,000 miles, then every 5 years or 100,000 miles

maintenance.notes: Manual explicitly includes motor electronics coolant in this item.

interval.logic: Conditional only; apply when towing, using a car-top carrier, extended idling/low-speed heavy use, dusty or sandy operation, exclusive E85 use, hot climates, or axle/transfer-case exception conditions apply

maintenance.notes: Do not present as normal-use requirements. Includes 60,000-mile spark plugs for towing or heavy low-speed/idling use, 5,000-mile or 6-month oil service in dusty/sandy operation, and axle/transfer-case service only when monitored message, submersion, leakage, or severe/extreme duty indicates service.

applicability: 2021 Ford Explorer gas and hybrid models covered by Ford's 2021 Explorer Gas/HEV Owner's Manual
VIN test target is 2021 Ford Explorer Platinum; trim-specific engine and drivetrain applicability still needs rendered-page verification
Police Interceptor or other fleet-specific supplements are not covered by this candidate unless the same owner manual applies
validation_flags: Candidate built from Ford's official 2021 Explorer Gas/HEV Owner's Manual, printing 2.
Text extraction checked pages 482-490 for scheduled maintenance; rendered-page verification remains required before production.
Oil change interval is monitor-driven; fixed mileage examples must not override the information display or one-year maximum.
Hybrid oil-change distance can exceed 10,000 miles, but not the one-year maximum.
Special operating condition services are conditional only and must not be shown as normal-use requirements.
Axle and transfer case fluid changes are not normal scheduled maintenance unless monitored or exception conditions apply.
